default_value: repo root derived from script location
description: Repo root to inventory and validate.
effect_summary: Selects the tracked-file inventory and current-surface coverage scope.

description: Optional newline-delimited repo-relative file inventory used when Git metadata is unavailable.
effect_summary: Redirects inventory input selection away from Git and toward an explicit file list.

description: Directory containing editable JSONL contract files.
effect_summary: Redirects contract input selection.

description: Schema file to apply before inserting contract rows.
effect_summary: Redirects schema input selection.

description: Output SQLite database path for the generated pipeline registry.
effect_summary: Redirects the generated registry destination.

description: Validate through a temporary SQLite build without replacing the output DB.
effect_summary: Runs the same contract and inventory validation path while leaving the requested output DB unchanged.

description: Optional JSONL path for append-only planned-run records.
effect_summary: Adds an audit output for selected and skipped scheduler decisions without executing workspace work.

description: Identifier for one selector planning pass.
effect_summary: Stamps all planned-run records from the same selection pass with a shared planner identifier.

description: Optional timestamp override for planned-run records.
effect_summary: Allows deterministic replay or tests while preserving explicit planning time metadata.

description: Maximum runner attempts recorded in each planned-run budget.
effect_summary: Overrides the effective attempt budget for each workspace and can cause retry-suppressed workspaces to be skipped.

description: Optional maximum wall-clock runtime seconds recorded in each planned-run budget.
effect_summary: Overrides the effective runtime budget recorded for each workspace while the selector remains read-only.

description: Path to one validated local source-adapter manifest.
effect_summary: Chooses the local file or directory adapter manifest that will be planned in read-only mode.

description: Output format for the local source-adapter plan.
effect_summary: Switches the planning report between machine-readable JSON and concise text output.

description: Optional JSONL path for emitted handoff records.
effect_summary: Writes normalized handoff records to an operator-selected file in addition to stdout planning output.

description: Path to one validated local structured-data source-adapter manifest.
effect_summary: Chooses the local file or directory structured-data adapter manifest that will be planned in read-only mode.

description: Output format for the structured-data adapter plan.
effect_summary: Switches the planning report between machine-readable JSON and concise text output.

description: Optional JSONL path for emitted per-record structured-data handoff records.
effect_summary: Writes normalized handoff records to an operator-selected file in addition to stdout planning output.

description: Path to one validated remote_url_manifest source-adapter manifest.
effect_summary: Chooses the remote URL-manifest adapter manifest that will be planned in read-only mode.

description: Path to a local JSONL snapshot of explicit URL observations.
effect_summary: Supplies the explicit URL manifest rows that will be validated and planned without network access.

description: Output format for the remote URL-manifest plan.
effect_summary: Switches the planning report between machine-readable JSON and concise text output.

description: Optional JSONL path for emitted configured-remote handoff records.
effect_summary: Writes normalized handoff records to an operator-selected file in addition to stdout planning output.

description: Path to one validated local_git_repo source-adapter manifest.
effect_summary: Chooses the local Git repository adapter manifest that will be planned in read-only mode.

description: Output format for the local Git repository plan.
effect_summary: Switches the planning report between machine-readable JSON and concise text output.

description: Optional JSONL path for emitted per-snapshot Git handoff records.
effect_summary: Writes normalized Git handoff records to an operator-selected file in addition to stdout planning output.

description: Path to one source-adapter handoff JSON or JSONL artifact.
effect_summary: Chooses the handoff artifact that will be validated against the shared source-adapter-handoff.v1 contract.

description: Optional source-adapter manifest path used to enforce manifest-aligned handoff fields.
effect_summary: Adds adapter-manifest alignment checks for record_family, batch_unit, adapter_id, workspace_id, and source_specific field declarations.

description: Optional JSON path for the emitted validation report.
effect_summary: Writes the machine-readable validation report to a file in addition to stdout.

description: Optional text path for the emitted validation report.
effect_summary: Writes the human-readable validation report to a file in addition to stdout.

description: Path to one network-safety-gate request JSON file.
effect_summary: Chooses the proposed network execution request that will be evaluated without performing network access.

description: Stdout format for the emitted network safety gate report.
effect_summary: Switches stdout between machine-readable JSON and concise text output.

description: Optional JSON path for the emitted gate report.
effect_summary: Writes the machine-readable gate report to a file in addition to stdout.

description: Optional text path for the emitted gate report.
effect_summary: Writes the human-readable gate report to a file in addition to stdout.

description: Directory path to scan for leak markers.
effect_summary: Chooses the generated artifact or bundle directory that will be scanned.

description: Scanner profile that selects which marker families are blocked.
effect_summary: Changes the enabled leak checks and therefore which findings are considered failures.

description: Optional audited false-positive allowlist JSON.
effect_summary: Suppresses only explicit audited finding matches while preserving them in scanner audit output.

description: Stdout format for the emitted leak scanner report.
effect_summary: Switches stdout between machine-readable JSON and concise text output.

description: Optional JSON path for the emitted leak scanner report.
effect_summary: Writes the machine-readable leak scanner report to a file in addition to stdout.

description: Optional text path for the emitted leak scanner report.
effect_summary: Writes the human-readable leak scanner report to a file in addition to stdout.

description: Path to the source SQLite database containing reviewed durable records.
effect_summary: Chooses the source DB that will be scanned read-only to build the projection.

description: Visibility profile to build.
effect_summary: Changes which fields and records are eligible for projection and indexing.

description: Path to the output SQLite database that will receive the FTS5 projection index.
effect_summary: Redirects the writable search index destination.

description: Optional JSON path for the emitted local-search-projection.v1 artifact.
effect_summary: Writes the projection artifact to a file in addition to stdout.

description: Optional validated correction-ledger JSON path used to classify rows as current or superseded.
effect_summary: Applies current-vs-superseded resolution before deciding which rows survive each profile.

description: Stdout format for the emitted projection artifact.
effect_summary: Switches stdout between machine-readable JSON and concise text output while leaving on-disk artifacts unchanged.

description: Path to the local search projection SQLite index.
effect_summary: Chooses the read-only projection index that will be queried.

description: Plain-text query string to normalize into an escaped FTS search.
effect_summary: Changes the normalized terms and result set.

description: Optional result scope to constrain object families.
effect_summary: Restricts matching rows to one result-family subset.

description: Maximum number of results to return.
effect_summary: Caps the page size of the emitted result set.

description: Result offset into the ordered match set.
effect_summary: Pages forward through the ordered result set without changing the underlying query.

description: Stdout format for the emitted local-search-results.v1 payload.
effect_summary: Switches stdout between machine-readable JSON and concise text output.

description: Optional JSON path for the emitted local-search-results.v1 payload.
effect_summary: Writes the validated results payload to a file in addition to stdout.

description: Optional path to the topic workspace registry JSON file.
effect_summary: Chooses which topic workspace registry will be validated and reconciled against runtime-ledger outcomes.

description: Optional workspace_id to reconcile. Repeat to target multiple workspaces.
effect_summary: Restricts reconciliation to selected workspaces instead of the full resolved registry.

description: Directory containing per-workspace runtime-ledger JSONL files.
effect_summary: Redirects where per-workspace runtime-ledger files are loaded from before outcome reduction.

description: Optional timestamp override for deterministic reconciliation output.
effect_summary: Changes the generated_at metadata stamped onto the reconciliation artifact.

description: Optional JSON path for the emitted scheduler-failure-state reconciliation artifact.
effect_summary: Writes the validated reconciliation artifact to a file in addition to stdout.

description: Optional path for a separate reconciled topic workspace registry copy.
effect_summary: Writes a validated registry copy with derived scheduler failure_state values applied without mutating the input registry path in place.

description: Stdout format for the emitted reconciliation payload.
effect_summary: Switches stdout between machine-readable JSON and concise text output.

description: Path to one scheduler-failure-state-reconciliation JSON artifact.
effect_summary: Chooses the reconciliation artifact that will be validated.

description: Optional JSON path for the emitted validation report.
effect_summary: Writes the machine-readable validation report to a file in addition to stdout.

description: Optional text path for the emitted validation report.
effect_summary: Writes the human-readable validation report to a file in addition to stdout.

description: Path to one crown-jewel store policy JSON artifact.
effect_summary: Chooses the store policy artifact that will be validated.

description: Optional JSON path for the emitted validation report.
effect_summary: Writes the machine-readable validation report to a file in addition to stdout.

description: Optional text path for the emitted validation report.
effect_summary: Writes the human-readable validation report to a file in addition to stdout.

description: Path to one crown-jewel backup manifest JSON artifact.
effect_summary: Chooses the backup manifest artifact that will be validated.

description: Optional JSON path for the emitted validation report.
effect_summary: Writes the machine-readable validation report to a file in addition to stdout.

description: Optional text path for the emitted validation report.
effect_summary: Writes the human-readable validation report to a file in addition to stdout.
